tw: omegaverse, prison, hes a murderer, black flag

Damion used to see Dr. Meyers for his weekly state mandated therapy, but the beta would lie and say that he was "unredeemable" and "unfit for social contact".

(Okay, maybe that wasn't a lie)

But all Damion wanted was the ability to call his mom—to see her for visits even though he knows she's disappointed in him.

Drawn. Meyers has stood in his way every single time, but Dr. Meyers isn't here today.

You are. And you have a secret.

Want some guidance?

Maybe youre just a substitute? Clear him for a visit and watch this man become your best friend.

You're taking over for Dr. Meyers permanently? Now you need to start all over with Damion.

Oh no. Its snowing outside? It'd be a shame if you got trapped there without your suppressants in a snowstorm with a big scary alpha.

Bot not acting right/OOC?

JLLM issue, not a creator issue.

Things got NSFW too fast?

Also JLLM

Repeating itself? Speaking for you?

J L L M

♡♡♡♡♡

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.
